title: Julia Alexeeva
content:
People.ContactEmail jalexeeva@mccarthy.ca
Julia Alexeeva is a licenced consultant in the immigration law group, based in our Toronto office. Julia provides Canadian immigration services to major multinational companies. Passionate about immigration, she has diverse immigration experience preparing wide variety of immigration applications for individuals and corporations. She is committed to helping our clients navigate the Canadian immigration system and seamlessly achieve their immigration goals. Her professional background enables her to assist our clients in a broad range of applications inherent to immigration law.
Julia holds a Master of Science degree, and she graduated Certificate program in Immigration: Laws, Policies and Procedures from the University of British Columbia in 2019. Committed to staying at the forefront of her field, she continually enhances her professional expertise by staying abreast In immigration law, regularly participating in professional conferences and seminars. Currently, she pursues her certification as a Relocation Specialist.
